idea-plugin.name: ChatTCP
idea-plugin.description:
ChatTCP Plugin for IntelliJ IDEA

ChatTCP is a TCP packet analysis tool dedicated to simplifying TCP packet capture and analysis, making viewing data packets as easy as reading chat messages.

The ChatTCP Plugin for IntelliJ IDEA enables rapid packet capture and analysis for debugging web interface issues.

Plugin Features:

  • Real-time TCP packet capture and viewing
  • Chat-style packet display (client/server conversation)
  • Decoding support exclusively for HTTP/WebSocket protocols
  • Export captured packets to PCAP files for further analysis

Requirements:

  • libpcap (macOS/Linux) or Npcap/WinPcap (Windows) must be installed
  • System permissions for packet capture are required during use
